response.justification: Bogdan has over 12 years of full-stack experience with deep proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK and Docker — all core to the role — plus direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and testing frameworks like Vitest. His open-source contributions, architectural versatility, and strong communication through workshops demonstrate exceptional alignment with the job’s technical and collaborative demands.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React matching primary stack perfectly
Proven AI-agent infrastructure work and experience with Vitest/testing frameworks
Strong DevOps and cloud skills (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes) with open-source leadership
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Kotlin/Java in recent roles, though DLang/Java experience exists
German language skill is only basic, may impact collaboration in Berlin-based team
Some older roles (e.g., WordPress, CMSushi) may suggest fragmented focus, though recent work is highly relevant
